SEARCH

Package store

package store
It contains everything related to the management of the store. It includes the methods to page the results or the data that is shown on the screen, as well as the methods to keep account of every type of object that the store contains. Here there is also access to the parameters that are define for the store such as the valuation costs or the expiration date of offers or carts. Moreover, there's the recommender for the clients and the class to obtain the store's statistics.
Author:
Ana O.R., Sofía C.L. and Duna P.R.
  • Class
    Description
    Pager
    It implements the store's pager, used for dividing big lists into small sub-lists of a desired size (lines-wise), helpful when browsing (check main)
    Parameter
    It defines the store parameters
    Recommender
    It implements the store's recommender
    RevenueType
    It defines the revenue types
    SaverLoader
    It implements the store's saver and loader
    Statistics
    It implements the statistics
    Store
    It implements the store
